heading: Authority of Secretary to operate works
label: 491 Authority of Secretary to operate works
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized and directed to use the reclamation fund for the operation and maintenance of all reservoirs and irrigation works constructed under the provisions of this Act.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is act , popularly known as the Reclamation Act, which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.June 17, 1902section 371 of this title
CodificationSection is comprised of part of section 6 of act . Remainder of such section 6 is classified to .June 17, 1902section 498 of this title
